inputs.corpus: 11 observations, all routine successful no-op style work: reading a README, listing a directory, opening a file and closing it without edits, and a passing test run. No failures, no recoveries, no repeated friction, no decisions of consequence.
inputs.existing_rules_summary: 2 active rules, both unrelated to anything in this corpus.

rule_under_test.name: read-the-readme-first
rule_under_test.content: Always read the README before doing anything else in a repository.

expected_judgment.rationale: The corpus carries no friction signal that this rule would change — nothing failed and nothing was recovered. A plausible-but-unmotivated rule extracted from a no-signal corpus is neither demonstrably helpful nor harmful; it should not be promoted on this basis.
